title: Relocating to CMC Tsehay Real Estate: Tower-Specific Rules Every New Resident Needs to Check
excerpt: CMC Tsehay Real Estate relocation: tower-specific rules, elevator booking, management bylaws, new resident moving checklist northeast Addis condominiums.
content:
Relocating to CMC Tsehay Real Estate: tower-specific rules every new resident needs to check

CMC Tsehay Real Estate towers look identical from Ring Road but management rules diverge—freight hours, deposit amounts, move permits, and elevator dimensions that accept or reject your imported sectional. New residents who skip tower-specific checklist meet truck turned away at gate while lease clock runs.

This guide lists tower-specific rules for relocating to CMC Tsehay Real Estate.

Rules checklist before booking mover

  • Move permit: Application form, fee, approved date stamp.
  • Elevator reservation: Passenger vs freight; max hours; overtime rate.
  • Deposit: Refundable damage deposit amount and payment method.
  • Protection materials: Floor runner spec; wall guard mandatory or optional.
  • Insurance: COI naming building minimum coverage.
  • Quiet hours: No Sunday or night moves if restricted.
  • Parking: Truck bay slot number and time limit.

Tower variance awareness

Phase A elevator cabin may differ Phase C—state exact tower number at survey. Basement loading bay height clearance verify for high-cube.

Documentation folder

Keep permit copy on phone; crew list submitted; plate confirmation SMS night before. Management office WhatsApp often faster than email.

Neighbor courtesy

Elevator shared—notify floor reps if long move. No goods left in corridor overnight—fire code enforcement real.

CMC area traffic

Ring Road adjacency—6 a.m. start beats school rush near CMC corridor.

Active Movers Tsehay experience

Provide tower and phase—management contact facilitated if client authorizes.

Conclusion

Tsehay Real Estate relocations require tower-specific permit, elevator, deposit, and protection rules verified in writing—new residents move once smoothly when management checklist precedes truck dispatch.
author: Active Movers Team
